title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIM Ahmedabad

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIM Ahmedabad
jsonLd.description:
IIM Ahmedabad, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Ahmedabad:
IIM Ahmedabad is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Ahmedabad!
